query: 需要，我如何开一个新的线程后，你能够引导我做测试？

transcript.content: 已经把 harder case 补进固定回归了。 新增 case： - `codex-minor-gc-zh-dense-multitopic-return` - 文件：[evals/codex-context-minor-gc-live-cases.js](/Users/redcreen/Project/unified-memory-core/evals/codex-context-minor-gc-live-cases.js)
要；尽量不是白名单，有硬编码嫌疑；
已经收住了，而且不是靠白名单。 我做了两步： - 把中文多轮切题 harder case 收进固定回归 - 再把 packaged guard 收紧成“不能覆盖 shadow guard 的否决”
那刚才不通过的测试，可以重新测试，预期是可以通过了对么？
能自动跑的，你帮我跑一遍
我已经替你自动跑了一遍： ```bash node scripts/eval-codex-context-minor-gc-live.js --format markdown ```
已经收成全绿了。 我继续做的两条通用修正是： - `continue` 下如果有 turn 被降成 `pin-only`，拒绝激活 - `summary-first` 不再强制优先；只要 raw keep 更轻，就统一退回 raw keep
就此结束，接下来， 我们重新来做测试，看下体感有么有明显改变；
可以，但这次为了看“体感有没有明显改变”，不要在当前线程测。 原因很直接： - 这个线程已经到 `384k / 486k` - 现在测出来的体感会被旧历史污染 - 你想看的其实是“新一轮真实使用时，是否更薄、更稳、更快收缩”
需要，我如何开一个新的线程后，你能够引导我做测试？

decision.archive_summary: Previous coding task is resolved: a harder Chinese multi-topic return case was added to the fixed regression suite, packaged guard behavior was tightened to avoid overriding shadow-guard vetoes, automated evals were rerun, and the suite was reported fully green after two general fixes (`continue` rejects pin-only demotion; `summary-first` no longer forced when raw-keep is lighter). The user then shifted to planning a fresh-thread test because the current thread had high context usage and would contaminate perceived responsiveness. Latest user turn asks how to start a new thread so the assistant can guide the test there.
decision.reasoning_summary: The earlier implementation/debugging block is finished and mostly solved, so the active topic has switched to procedural guidance for testing in a new thread. Raw details of the green test run and code changes are no longer needed for the next turn. The only clearly durable preference worth preserving as a compact pin is the user's preference to avoid whitelist-like hardcoding.
